commits.name: Commit-0
commits.content:
<template>
  <view class="goods-detail-page">
    <!-- 商品轮播图 -->
    <swiper
      :indicator-dots="true"
      autoplay
      circular
      :interval="3000"
      class="swiper"
    >
      <swiper-item v-for="(img, index) in goods.images" :key="index">
        <image :src="img.image" class="swiper-img" mode="aspectFill" />
      </swiper-item>
    </swiper>

    <!-- 商品信息 -->
    <view class="info-box">
      <view class="goods-title">{{ goods.title }}</view>
      <view class="goods-price">
        <text class="price"
          >{{ goods.price }}
          <text style="font-size: 12px; margin-left: 5rpx">能量</text>
        </text>
        <text class="origin-price">￥{{ goods.original_price }}</text>
      </view>
      <view class="goods-desc">{{ goods.desc }}</view>
    </view>
    <view class="goods-detail-images">
      <view class="section-title">商品详情</view>
      <image
        v-for="(img, index) in goods.detailImages"
        :key="index"
        :src="img"
        mode="widthFix"
        class="detail-img"
      />
    </view>
    <!-- 操作栏 -->
    <view class="bottom-bar">
      <!-- <view class="btn-cart" @click="addToCart">加入购物车</view> -->
      <view class="btn-buy" @click="buyNow">立即兑换</view>
    </view>
  </view>
</template>

<script>
export default {
  data() {
    return {
      goods: {
        id: 1,
        title: 'Apple iPhone 15 Pro 256G',
        price: 999,
        original_price: 9999,
        desc: 'A17芯片 + 钛金属边框 + 4800万像素',
        images: [
          { image: require('../../static/bgs.png') },
          { image: require('../../static/12.jpeg') },
          { image: require('../../static/ball.jpeg') },
        ],
        detailImages: [
          require('../../static/bgs.png'),
          require('../../static/12.jpeg'),
          require('../../static/ball.jpeg'),
        ],
      },
    };
  },
  methods: {
    addToCart() {
      uni.showToast({ title: '已加入购物车', icon: 'success' });
      //可接入购物车逻辑
    },
    buyNow() {
      uni.navigateTo({
        url: `/pages/order/confirm?goodsId=${this.goods.id}`,
      });
    },
  },
};
</script>

<style scoped>
.goods-detail-page {
  background-color: #f8f8f8;
  padding-bottom: 100rpx;
}

.swiper {
  width: 100%;
  height: 600rpx;
}

.swiper-img {
  width: 100%;
  height: 100%;
  object-fit: cover;
}

.info-box {
  padding: 30rpx;
  background-color: #fff;
}

.goods-title {
  font-size: 32rpx;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-bottom: 20rpx;
}

.goods-price {
  font-size: 28rpx;
  color: #e93b3d;
  margin-bottom: 20rpx;
}

.price {
  font-size: 36rpx;
  font-weight: bold;
}

.origin-price {
  text-decoration: line-through;
  color: #999;
  font-size: 26rpx;
  margin-left: 20rpx;
}

.goods-desc {
  color: #666;
  font-size: 26rpx;
  line-height: 1.6;
}

/* 底部操作栏 */
.bottom-bar {
  position: fixed;
  bottom: 0;
  left: 0;
  right: 0;
  display: flex;
  background-color: #fff;
  border-top: 1rpx solid #eee;
  padding: 20rpx;
  justify-content: space-between;
}

.btn-cart {
  flex: 1;
  margin-right: 20rpx;
  background-color: #ff9500;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 50rpx;
  font-size: 28rpx;
  padding: 20rpx;
}

.btn-buy {
  /* flex: 1;
  background-color: #e93b3d;
  color: white;
  border-radius: 50rpx;
  font-size: 28rpx;
  padding: 20rpx; */
  background-color: #ff8400;
  flex: 1;
  padding: 20rpx;
  border-radius: 20rpx;
  color: white;
  text-align: center;
}
.goods-detail-images {
  padding: 30rpx;
  background-color: #fff;
  margin-top: 20rpx;
}

.section-title {
  font-size: 28rpx;
  font-weight: bold;
  margin-bottom: 20rpx;
  color: #333;
}

.detail-img {
  width: 100%;
  margin-bottom: 20rpx;
  border-radius: 10rpx;
}
</style>
